rationale: Career spans Civil Engineer, HR Manager, and Content Writer roles at Stark Industries (fictional company) and Infosys, with no ML, IR, or engineering skills relevant to ranking or retrieval systems.

Has Qdrant (advanced) and RAG (intermediate) skills listed, but current employer is Stark Industries (fictional) and all career descriptions focus on data pipelines, BI dashboards, and Kafka/Snowflake analytics with no evidence of owning retrieval or ranking systems.

Lists Weaviate (advanced, 46mo) as a skill but the sole career role at Pied Piper (fictional company) is entirely cloud infrastructure/DevOps (AWS, Terraform, Kubernetes) with only self-learner-level AI exposure and insufficient depth in IR or ranking.

Entirely non-technical career as Content Writer, Customer Support, and Accountant with a stint listed as Civil Engineer at Wipro; skills are SEO and BigQuery beginner with no ML, retrieval, or engineering experience.

Full stack and QA engineering career at Dunder Mifflin (fictional company) with skills limited to Kafka/Redis beginner and Photoshop; no ML, embeddings, ranking, or IR experience anywhere in the profile.

Entire career spent at Wipro and Infosys in Operations Manager and Marketing Manager roles; despite an M.S. in Data Science from a tier_2 institution, there is no engineering or ML production experience evident.

Career is entirely non-technical (Graphic Designer, Sales Executive, Operations Manager) across multiple fictional companies (Wayne Enterprises, Initech, Dunder Mifflin) with no ML or engineering skills whatsoever.

Has hands-on pgvector (advanced, 44mo) and Pinecone (intermediate, 23mo) skills with product-company experience at CRED and Zoho, but career is squarely data engineering rather than IR/ranking system ownership, and lacks evidence of NDCG/evaluation framework work.
Only 2.7 years of experience in an operations/logistics role at TCS with skills limited to TypeScript, Docker, and HTML; no ML, retrieval, or engineering depth relevant to the role.

Career of 13.4 years spans Business Analyst, Project Manager, Graphic Designer, and Marketing Manager roles at Acme Corp and Stark Industries (fictional), with no ML or IR engineering experience despite a B.Tech in AI.
